Who I Am

About Me

Hi, I'm Chandan 👋 — a Computer Science Engineering graduate from SJC Institute of Technology, Bangalore, passionate about building things that live on the web and beyond.

Currently working as an IT Engineer & Full Stack Developer at Liveon Technolabs Pvt. Ltd., I build responsive business websites, Python automation tools, and backend integrations. I've also completed a full-stack internship at Inflow Technologies (IBM Partnership).

My interests span cloud computing, machine learning, and crafting fast, beautiful web experiences that solve real problems.
